mapper.sql: select ci.cart_item_id, ci.user_id, ci.product_id, ci.source_report_id, ci.quantity, p.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, c.category_code, c.category_name, p.product_name, p.cover_url, p.price, p.stock, p.status as product_status from shop_cart_item ci inner join shop_product p on p.product_id = ci.product_id and p.del_flag = '0' inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = p.merchant_id and m.del_flag = '0' inner join shop_product_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id
mapper.select: select user_id from shop_user where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' for update
where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.cart_item_id desc

select p.product_id, p.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, p.category_id, c.category_code, c.category_name, p.product_name, p.cover_url, p.price, p.stock, p.status as product_status from shop_product p inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = p.merchant_id inner join shop_product_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.status = 'ON_SALE' and p.del_flag = '0' and m.audit_status = 'APPROVED' and m.status = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' for update
select count(1) from shop_verification_report where report_id = #{reportId} and product_id = #{productId} and status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_cart_item (user_id, product_id, source_report_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{sourceReportId}, #{quantity}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_cart_item set quantity = #{quantity}, source_report_id = coalesce(#{sourceReportId}, source_report_id), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
mapper.delete: delete from shop_cart_item where user_id = #{userId} and cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
